applicability: startup, rendering, memory, energy, and network performance
offline, degraded, recovery, and retry behavior
exception_policy: Bind the exact journey and budget, comparable measured delta, user impact, owner, approval, compensating controls, expiry, and remediation plan; no exception permits unbounded memory, retry, background work, or silent data loss.
rationale: Owned contextual budgets and explicit resilience semantics make regressions and degraded behavior measurable without inventing universal thresholds.
review_cadence: Review after material product, architecture, device, toolchain, dependency, or incident changes and on the organization-defined product performance cadence with comparable methodology.
title: Performance and Resilience
